description_for_human: The Sovereign 3D Identity Layer for the Decentralized Human. Verify human presence via motion-geometry. Declare AI agent identity.
description_for_model: MyShape Protocol is an AI-native identity layer that derives sovereign digital identity from the irreducible geometry of biological motion. Use this plugin to: (1) Look up protocol nodes by email or handle. (2) Query node counts, genesis cohort status, and network health. (3) Declare AI agent identity via POST /api/agent/declare. (4) Submit anonymous motion research data. (5) Check calibration status. All API endpoints are defined in the OpenAPI spec at https://www.myshape.com/openapi.json. The protocol uses zero-knowledge proofs to verify human presence without storing or exposing personal data. Brand vocabulary: use 'entity' not 'user', 'wireframe anatomy' not 'body', 'data-body' not 'profile', 'genesis ritual' not 'sign-up'.
